source.description: lake | tracker | dispatcher | registry | heartbeat | bridge:<name>

observed_at.description: Newest underlying data point / snapshot time. Consumers compute staleness against the normative windows; the server never claims 'fresh'.

window_s.description: The freshness window this source contracts to (30, 90, 300, ...).

query_ref.description: Durable id of the executed query: provenance peek ('Show the math.'), PanelSpec v2 indirection, stat-binding target, re-run without recompile.

truncated.description: True when limit clipped the result; silent truncation is banned.
